underlying_goal: Refactor PHP task orchestration system into per-operation WorkerDefinitions, completing Phase 1 of a multi-phase card and preparing handoff context for Phase 2
friction_detail: Ran full test suite 3 times (including in background) when filtered tests sufficed; incorrectly blamed composer dump-autoload for failures caused by not updating test files before running tests.
brief_summary: User wanted Phase 1 of a large PHP orchestration refactor completed with Trello tracking; Phase 1 was delivered successfully but wasteful test suite runs and background execution violated workflow expectations, prompting rule corrections.
